## Context

The template ships a stub `SECURITY.md` with the org's security email.
Replace with:

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Real reporting channel (email + GPG public key fingerprint, or HackerOne URL)
- [ ] Time-to-acknowledge commitment (typically 72 hours)
- [ ] Coordinated disclosure window
- [ ] Scope: what's in/out of program
